use_cases: Display when a user navigates to a non-existent URL or broken link
Provide visual feedback when an API request returns a 404 status
Guide users back to valid pages after encountering missing content
Serve as a branded error state for empty search results or deleted items
ai_summary: A minimalist not-found (404) error page component that provides user feedback when a requested page or resource doesn't exist. Part of the molecule-lab design system, this component typically displays an error message with navigation options to redirect users back to valid content.
